description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI for general build that runs on push to master and tags matching v*, on pull requests to master, and on release creation. The workflow uses a matrix strategy to build on ubuntu-latest, macos-latest, and windows-latest for different architectures. For each job, check out the code, set up Python 3.x, configure and build with CMake, run tests with ctest, package with cpack, build a Python wrapper, and upload artifacts and release assets.
